svg.text: Honed travertine / marble plate · carved wordmark · gilded dot · inset QR
(a) V-cut 60° · 6 deep · bare; gilded dot = cup + leaf
(b) QR plate flush in routed pocket · sealed · swappable
LT Museum (brand vector) · V-cut · bare letters
23.5ct gold leaf — the single gold accent
matte · sealed · shelter from direct spray
— Lettering hand-carved V-incision preferred (CNC acceptable); letters left bare.
— Lighting: warm 2700–3000K grazing from one side; a tight glint on the dot. Never cool / blue.
— Fixing: concealed 316 stainless pins + epoxy into masonry; ventilated cavity.
— Setting-out: wordmark centre-line approx. 1400–1500 AFL; QR centre approx. 1200–1300 AFL.
— Sign-off: cut a stone sample (two letters + gilded dot) and scan-test the QR in sun and dusk.
REV A · not for structural use
